features.name: mailbox without type parameter
features.description: Code should include a mailbox instantiation without specifying the type parameter, where the mailbox constructor is called with a capacity argument

features.name: parameterized class with type parameter lacking default
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class definition where a type parameter has no default value, used in a context where type cannot be inferred

features.name: mailbox put and get with type inference
features.description: Code should include mailbox put and get operations where the mailbox type is not explicitly specified but should be inferred from the argument types
